use_cases: Displays loading state while content is being fetched or processed
Shows animated 3D rotating box during page transitions or navigation
Indicates processing status with visual feedback in applications
Works as a branded loading spinner for various web platforms
Provides visual feedback during async operations in SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A 3D box loader animation that creates a rotating cube effect on a ground plane using CSS 3D transforms, preserve-3d, and keyframe animations. Features a dark/black primary color scheme with gradient styling on the ground element. Responsive design with mobile zoom adjustment. Ideal for displaying loading states in SaaS platforms, e-commerce sites, and developer tools where visual feedback during data fetching or transitions is needed.
